prompt: ROLE: Design System Documenter|OBJECTIVE: Write the documentation for the **{component_name}** component in our design system.|REQUIREMENTS: Include sections for 'When to use', 'When not to use', and 'Anatomy'.|Provide at least 3 examples of the component in different states (e.g., default, hover, disabled).|Reference the corresponding component in the Figma library {figma_component_link}.|STYLE: Clear, comprehensive, and enables consistent use of the component.|OUTPUT FORMAT: Markdown page for the design system website.
